jobDistinction.legacyPausedAuditJob: Broad website issue discovery plus small automatic fixes/upgrades; currently paused.
jobDistinction.currentRemediationJob: Backlog-driven remediation, optimization, and upgrade loop based on .hermes/remediation-backlog.md.

nonOverlapPolicy: If the previous remediation run is still active, skip the current tick instead of starting another fix run.

freshAuditPolicy.action: Run comprehensive audit, update remediation-backlog.md with newly discovered or reprioritized issues, then continue remediation.

lastHealthyBaseline.tests: Full Vitest suite passed: 170 files / 675 tests; targeted system-health + quick-service regressions passed: 19 tests
lastHealthyBaseline.production: vcontrolhub-next and vcontrolhub-ssh-ws restarted successfully; /api/status healthy; /api/system-health and Quick Services check-port unauth probes returned 401; recent service logs clean

lastRun.summary: Replaced remaining local shell-string execSync health and Quick Services port checks with argv-based execFileSync calls plus in-process parsing. System Health now calls systemctl/git without shell pipelines, and Quick Services port discovery/check-port no longer shells through grep/pipes. Remaining ssh2.exec remote-command surfaces are tracked by the background-task architecture item.
validation: recent production service logs checked with no new error/warn matches
lastRun.deployment: Production services restarted successfully and smoke test passed.
lastRun.nextTarget: Fresh comprehensive audit is due because successfulRemediationRunsSinceFreshAudit reached 6 and the only remaining listed backlog item is the larger P6 background-task architecture hardening.

runPolicy.batchSize: coherent deployable batch; may be larger for high-value architecture/performance/availability/user-experience improvements if fully verified
